fps.justification: Minimum 15 FPS required for reliable PPG signal capture per Webster 2009

contactDetection.justification: 10 frames @ 30 FPS = 333ms to confirm finger presence; 120 frames = 4s to declare lost

clippingThresholds.justification: 255-253 = 2 levels of headroom for sensor saturation detection

roi.justification: 16x16 grid with stride 4 balances resolution vs performance

buffers.justification: 300 samples @ 30 FPS = 10 seconds of signal history

bandpass.justification: 0.5 Hz = 30 BPM min, 8 Hz = 480 BPM max (practical 220 BPM). 4th order for -24dB/octave roll-off
bandpass.citation: Butterworth Filtering at 500 Hz Optimizes PPG-Based Heart Rate Variability. MDPI Sensors 2024; 25(22):7091

beatDetection.justification: Hard refractory 250ms (240 BPM max). Soft refractory 55% of expected RR. Hysteresis prevents double-peaks
beatDetection.citation: Adaptive threshold method for the peak detection of photoplethysmography. Comput Methods Programs Biomed 2024

spo2.source: van Gastel et al. 2016, Sensors 2023 meta-analysis
spo2.citation: van Gastel M, et al. Camera SpO2 calibration. Sensors 2023; 23(4): 2100
spo2.justification: Quadratic model: SpO2 = A + B*R + C*R² where R is ratio-of-ratios. Population model requires device-specific calibration for clinical use.

bloodPressure.source: PPG morphology-based estimation via pulse transit time proxy
bloodPressure.citation: Mukkamala R, et al. Toward ubiquitous blood pressure monitoring. NPJ Digit Med. 2018; 1: 24
bloodPressure.justification: Estimation from PPG morphology features (SUT, pulse width, area, AI, SI). NOT a direct measurement. Population model - requires cuff calibration for clinical accuracy.

glucose.source: PPG morphology correlation with vascular compliance
glucose.citation: Avram R, et al. Peripheral and central correlates of blood glucose. NPJ Digit Med. 2020; 3: 65
glucose.justification: Research-grade optical proxy. PPG morphology features correlate with blood glucose through vascular compliance and blood viscosity changes. NOT for clinical diagnosis. Intercept represents population statistical center, NOT normal value.

lipids.source: PPG morphology correlation with atherosclerosis markers
lipids.citation: Ferizoli TG, et al. Photoplethysmography for cardiovascular risk assessment. Sci Rep. 2024; 14: 3845
lipids.justification: Research-grade optical proxy. PPG morphology correlates with arterial stiffness and atherosclerosis markers. NOT for clinical diagnosis. Population statistical centers used for deviation calculation.

signalQualityIndex.justification: Based on autocorrelation peak strength and template matching confidence

perfusionIndex.justification: Minimum 0.3% AC/DC ratio required for reliable PPG signal per ISO 80601-2-61

bpm.justification: Bradycardia < 35 or tachycardia > 200 requires medical attention

rrInterval.justification: 200 BPM = 300ms RR; 27 BPM = 2222ms RR. Refractory prevents double detection.

spo2.justification: Physiologically impossible < 50% or > 100% (allowing measurement error margin)

bandpass.justification: 0.5 Hz removes baseline wander; 8 Hz captures up to 480 BPM (way above physiological max)

ema.justification: Alpha values tuned for 30 FPS target rate with physiological signal characteristics

evidenceGate.justification: Forensic-grade requirement: fail closed. If cannot verify measurement validity, output null with explicit reason.
